title: Take a seat, someone will come get you
expression: Take a seat, someone will come get you

sentences.en: It's going good, real good. Thank you.
★ Excellent. Take a seat around the corner,
sentences.ko: ★ 좋아요. 저 모퉁이 쪽에 앉아 계시면,

sentences.en: ★ and someone from talent acquisition will come get you.
